Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 1. Analyze the Request Goal Create a structured visualizable process model BPMN-like textual description based on provided interview transcripts Input 5 interview transcripts Accounts Payable Clerk Purchasing Officer Department Manager AP Supervisor Supplier Relationship Manager Output Requirements Activities Tasks Sequence Flow Gateways Decision Points Roles Participants Artifacts Inputs Outputs Exceptions Variations Constraints Consolidate conflicting accounts note uncertainty ensure clarity logic handle incomplete inconsistent details by noting ambiguities

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 2. Analyze the Input Data Interview Transcripts Interview 1 Mary AP Clerk Start Invoice arrives email Step 1 Check for PO number Decision 1 No PO Send back to supplier requesting details Has PO Log into accounting system Step 2 Forward to Purchasing confirm receipt Step 3 Match invoice line items against PO Matches Send to department manager approval Discrepancy Email Purchasing clarify Unresolved escalate to supervisor Manager approves schedule payment Interview 2 Dan Purchasing Officer Trigger Invoice from AP Check details vs PO Off contact supplier hold until corrected Confirm email to AP Interview 3 Carlos Dept Manager Trigger after PO match Dan confirm Review approve or reject suspicious Interview 4 Rita AP Supervisor Exceptions escalation contact suppliers coordinate retrospective PO for informal services back to normal flow Interview 5 Karen Supplier Manager Indirect loop in for discrepancies contact supplier inform correct price

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 3. Synthesize and Resolve Conflicts Ambiguities Conflict 1 PO Check Mary checks first Dan tells Mary to get it Resolution Mary initial check primary gateway Conflict 2 Matching Mary after Purchasing Dan when receives Resolution Three-way match PO Receipt Invoice Purchasing confirms receipt then Mary matches Conflict 3 Manager Trigger consistent system auto-email notification Conflict 4 Discrepancy Rita manages escalation Karen resource Conflict 5 Payment AP schedules consistent

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: 4. Name: Validation - PE
Text: 5. Refining the Model Self-Correction during drafting Correction distinguish happy path exception paths Correction clarify retrospective PO sub-process Correction Karen external helper during exception not standard step Note inferring logic vs disagreed

Name: Validation - PE
Text: 6. Name: Backtracking - PE
